methods.description: Process for collecting and culturing the pennate diatom Hantzschia amphioxys for experimental observation.

steps.description: The pennate diatom Hantzschia amphioxys was collected from the wild near Eugene, Oregon.
steps.searchable_summary: collect Hantzschia amphioxys from wild near Eugene, Oregon

steps.description: Cells were cultured as previously described.
steps.searchable_summary: culture diatom cells using established method

methods.description: Procedure for observing and measuring spindle features in diatom cells using light and electron microscopy.

steps.description: Cells were immobilized for irradiations by sandwiching them between a thin agar pad and the quartz cover slip.
steps.searchable_summary: immobilize cells using agar pad and quartz cover slip

steps.description: Measurements of the spindle were taken by placing a sheet of acetate on the monitor screen and marking the positions of spindle features.
steps.searchable_summary: measure spindle features using acetate sheet on monitor

methods.description: Procedure for irradiating mitotic cells and recording the effects using a TV system.

steps.description: Mitotic cells were videotaped for a short time prior to irradiation using polarization optics.
steps.searchable_summary: videotape mitotic cells using polarization optics

steps.description: The visible image of the irradiation beam was focused and centered using the normal condenser controls.
steps.searchable_summary: focus and center irradiation beam using condenser controls

steps.description: The portion of the cell to be irradiated was placed in the beam path using the stage controls.
steps.searchable_summary: position cell in beam path using stage controls

steps.description: The UV-irradiation was timed with the video recorder's timedate generator.
steps.searchable_summary: time UV-irradiation using video recorder's timedate generator
